QW-350  WELDING VARIABLES FOR WELDERS — PERFORMANCE QUALIFICATION. (a) The essential variables for performance qualification shall be as required by the tables of this paragraph. (b) A change in an essential variable requires requalification in accordance with QW-300 and QW-301. (c) Essential variables include changes to process, electrode type, position, and backing. For procedure variables, see QW-250. Filler metal variables shall comply with QW-404. Qualification range for thickness is subject to QW-310. Refer to QW-401 for general qualification rules, except as permitted by QW-190 for alternative methods.
